Query: SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' and time-taken < 1000
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' and time-taken between 1000 and 3000
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%'
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' and sc-status = 500
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' and time-taken > 3000
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%CheckHandy%' and time-taken < 500
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%HandyAPI%' and cs-uri-stem like '%SaveAdd%' and time-taken < 2000
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%CheckHandy%'
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%HandyAPI%' and cs-uri-stem like '%SaveAdd%'
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%HandyAPI%' and cs-uri-stem like '%GetInfoTem%'
SELECT count(*) FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%HandyAPI%' and cs-uri-stem like '%GetInfoTem%' and time-taken < 500

SELECT TOP 20 cs-uri-stem as URL, MAX(time-taken) As Max, MIN(time-taken) As Min, Avg(time-taken) As Average, Count(*) as Hits FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' GROUP BY URL ORDER By Average DESC
SELECT TOP 20 cs-uri-stem as URL, Count(*) as Hits FROM '[LOGFILEPATH]' where cs-uri-stem like '%api%' and sc-status <> 200 GROUP BY URL ORDER By Hits DESC
